nibbāna.en: nibbāna; liberation; the extinguishing of greed, hatred, delusion

bhagavā.en: the Blessed One; the Fortunate One

tathāgata.en: the Tathāgata; the Thus-gone (epithet of a Buddha)

sādhu.en: good!; well done; it is good

buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.en: I go to the Buddha for refuge.

dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.en: I go to the Dhamma for refuge.

saṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.en: I go to the Sangha for refuge.

namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambud.en: Homage to the Blessed One, the Worthy One, the Fully Self-Awakened One.
namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambud.zh: 礼敬世尊、阿罗汉、正等正觉者。
